scene_input.scene_summary: Al-Mundhir ibn Muḥammad charges at the aggressors
scene_input.key_visual_action: Al-Mundhir running forward with his sword raised

schema_output.scene_summary: Al-Mundhir ibn Muḥammad charges at the aggressors
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 188
schema_output.moral_lesson: Standing up for what is right and protecting others takes courage and bravery

characters.name: Al-Mundhir ibn Muḥammad
characters.appearance: tall and athletic build, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, holding a sword in one hand and running forward with a determined expression

characters.name: Aggressor
characters.appearance: medium build, wearing a worn leather tunic and carrying a club, with a fierce and aggressive expression

schema_output.narrative_text: Al-Mundhir ibn Muḥammad bravely charges at the aggressors to protect his family and friends.

compliance.notes: No graphic violence or explicit content

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A vast expanse of sandy desert landscape with rocky outcroppings in the distance. Late afternoon sunlight casts long shadows across the sand, with a few wispy clouds scattered across the sky. In the foreground, a lone figure is seen from behind: the central figure seen entirely from behind, tall and athletic build, wearing a flowing white thobe with a deep blue woolen cloak draped over both shoulders, a white turban with a cloth tail hanging between the shoulder blades, holding a sword in one hand and running forward with a determined expression. In the background, a group of figures can be seen, wearing worn leather tunics and carrying clubs, with a fierce and aggressive expression. Soft warm golden light, dramatic and action-packed mood. Medium shot at eye level. Warm beige, golden, and blue palette with the deep blue cloak as a color anchor. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
